RedCat:Study.DESCRIPTION: When card returns to hand, base damage +!M! and gain Retain for 1 turn.

RedCat:Kick.NAME: Vigor Kick
RedCat:Kick.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If you have Vigor, deal extra damage.

RedCat:QuickRun.NAME: High Speed Movement
RedCat:QuickRun.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M!X Vigor. Next X Attacks do not consume Vigor.

RedCat:PurityStrike.NAME: Pure Strike
RedCat:PurityStrike.DESCRIPTION: Cannot be rainworld:corrupt . NL Deal !D! damage. Only playable at 0 Corruption Value.

RedCat:FastHit.NAME: First Strike
RedCat:FastHit.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If first card played this turn, gain !M! Vigor.

RedCat:Bypass.NAME: Excuse Me, I'm in a Hurry
RedCat:Bypass.DESCRIPTION: If combat won within !M! turns, add 1 Relic to reward and gain 1 rainworld:karma.
RedCat:Bypass.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: If combat won within 3 turns, add 1 Relic to reward and gain 1 rainworld:karma.

RedCat:CreateSong.NAME: Creator's Song
RedCat:CreateSong.DESCRIPTION: Gain [E] at start of turn. NL Lose 2 HP when gaining Corruption Value.

RedCat:Mania.NAME: Mania
RedCat:Mania.DESCRIPTION: When played, cannot play Skills this turn, but gain !M! Vigor per Attack played.

RedCat:BigClean.NAME: Purge
RedCat:BigClean.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust all cards in hand have rainworld:different_state with this card. Deal !D! damage to random enemy per exhausted card.

RedCat:BeSame.NAME: Homogenize
RedCat:BeSame.DESCRIPTION: Clear Corruption Value if in rainworld:rottification; else gain 5 rainworld:corruption_value.

RedCat:SpearBoom.NAME: Explosive Spear
RedCat:SpearBoom.DESCRIPTION: rainworld:spear. NL Deal !D! damage. Then deal !D! damage to all enemies NL Put a Spear into discard pile.
RedCat:SpearBoom.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: rainworld:spear. NL Deal !D! damage. Then deal !D! damage to all enemies NL Put a Spear+ into discard pile.

RedCat:CatLost.NAME: Lost Cat
RedCat:CatLost.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times. NL Base hit count and damage randomize at start of turn.
RedCat:CatLost.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times. NL Base hit count and damage randomize at start of turn (higher range).

RedCat:Expand.NAME: Whimsy
RedCat:Expand.DESCRIPTION: Gain [E] [E]. Next !M! cards played return to hand.

RedCat:Immunity.NAME: Immunity Factor
RedCat:Immunity.DESCRIPTION: Give rainworld:immunity_factor to all non-corrupted Attack and Skill cards in hand.

RedCat:KeenStrike.NAME: Keen Strike
RedCat:KeenStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Draw 1 card per debuff on target.

RedCat:Ruminate.NAME: Ruminate
RedCat:Ruminate.DESCRIPTION: Consume 1 rainworld:fullness. NL Choose a card from discard pile to hand, cost -1 next play this turn.

RedCat:Avenger.NAME: Revenge
RedCat:Avenger.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies. Deal extra damage for each rainworld:karma triggered this combat.

RedCat:Grow.NAME: Wild Growth
RedCat:Grow.DESCRIPTION: rainworld:corrupt. NL Double your Temporary HP. Then convert block to Temporary HP.

RedCat:FinalHunt.NAME: Great Harvest
RedCat:FinalHunt.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If target has rainworld:hunt_mark, deal !M! extra damage.

RedCat:Slime.NAME: Slimy
RedCat:Slime.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, put !M! Corruptions into hand.

RedCat:SpearStabHead.NAME: Jaw Pierce
RedCat:SpearStabHead.DESCRIPTION: rainworld:spear. NL Deal !D! damage, apply !M! Vulnerable and rainworld:trauma.

RedCat:Iteration.NAME: Iteration
RedCat:Iteration.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, gain !B! block. NL Double values each time played.

RedCat:Fucycle.NAME: Negative Cycle
RedCat:Fucycle.DESCRIPTION: Unplayable. NL At end of combat, add 1 copy to deck (max 1).
RedCat:Fucycle.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw 1 card, gain 1 rainworld:karma. NL At end of combat, add 1 copy to deck (max 1). NL Exhaust.

Lalacha:VoidHand.NAME: Void Hand
Lalacha:VoidHand.DESCRIPTION: Draw cards equal to exhausted cards. They cost 0 this turn. NL Exhaust

Lalacha:TubeBug.NAME: Tube Worm
Lalacha:TubeBug.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL While retained, all enemies lose 1 temporary Strength. NL When played, gain 1 rainworld:fullness. NL Exhaust.
Lalacha:TubeBug.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. Retain. NL While retained, all enemies lose 2 temporary Strength. NL When played, gain 1 rainworld:fullness. NL Exhaust.
